marcus-chen.name: Marcus Chen
marcus-chen.title: Asia Education Correspondent
marcus-chen.shortBio: Marcus Chen is the Asia education correspondent for British Schools Asia, based in Hong Kong, where he covers British and international schools across the region.
marcus-chen.longBio:
Marcus Chen is the Asia education correspondent for British Schools Asia, based in Hong Kong, where he covers British and international schools across the region.

He writes on fees, regulation, inspections, governance, and the parent experience — with a particular focus on Hong Kong, Singapore, and the mainland China markets. Before joining British Schools Asia he worked in London as a researcher covering education and policy.
